codeSystems.name: AttachmentTagVS
codeSystems.title: Attachment Tag ValueSet
codeSystems.description:
Standard semantic tags used for categorization and workflow
qualification of attachments.

codeSystems.name: ObservationTagVS
codeSystems.title: Observation Tag ValueSet
codeSystems.description:
Semantic tags used in meta.tag to qualify DiagnosticReport and
Observation resources participating in hierarchical parent-child
resource structures.

Top-level operational categories for procedures
and service requests.

codeSystems.name: ProcedureCategorySubcategory314eVS
codeSystems.title: 314e Procedure Subcategories
codeSystems.description:
Procedure subcategories used for more granular
operational classification.
